# Harzotech Nig Ltd

> Harzotech Nig Ltd is a technology solutions company based in Lekki, Lagos, Nigeria. We build premium websites, custom software, AI automation systems, managed IT support structures, and SEO visibility frameworks for businesses across Nigeria and Africa.

Harzotech was founded by Azeez Agbona O., an IT specialist, developer, AI enthusiast, and digital strategist with over 10 years of experience. The company's approach is commercially driven: every digital system we build is designed to help businesses grow, attract customers, operate more efficiently, and scale.

We serve businesses across healthcare, real estate, retail, fintech, education, logistics, and professional services. We have delivered 50+ projects and work with clients throughout Nigeria.

## Services

- [Website Design & Development](https://harzotech.com.ng/website-development): Premium business websites, e-commerce stores, landing pages, and corporate web presences — conversion-focused, SEO-ready, and mobile-first.
- [Custom Software Development](https://harzotech.com.ng/software-development): Business portals, CRM systems, dashboards, SaaS platforms, booking systems, POS systems, inventory management, and operational software.
- [AI Automation & Workflow Systems](https://harzotech.com.ng/ai-automation): AI voice agents, WhatsApp automation, appointment booking workflows, CRM automation, lead qualification systems, and business process automation.
- [Managed IT Support & Maintenance](https://harzotech.com.ng/it-support-maintenance): Help desk, security monitoring, cloud backup, email setup, system maintenance, and proactive IT management for businesses in Lagos.
- [SEO & Digital Marketing](https://harzotech.com.ng/seo-digital-marketing): Technical SEO, local SEO, Google rankings, content strategy, analytics setup, and lead generation systems for Nigerian businesses.
- [Corporate Identity & Branding](https://harzotech.com.ng/services): Brand identity, business profiles, digital assets, and corporate presentation systems.
- [Business Applications](https://harzotech.com.ng/services): POS, payroll, pharmacy, hospital management, learning management, and industry-specific applications.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://harzotech.com.ng): Overview of all services, industries served, client testimonials, and featured projects.

- [Services](https://harzotech.com.ng/services): Full list of all technology services offered.
- [Projects](https://harzotech.com.ng/projects): Portfolio of delivered websites, software platforms, and AI systems.
- [Contact](https://harzotech.com.ng/contact): Start a project, request a quote, or book a consultation.
